function.content:
---
record_type: bill
bill_id: bill.hearthline_sensor_bundle
alias: hearthline_sensor_bundle
purchased_on: 2026-01-30
total_eur: 50
counterparty: Bärenfunk Elektronik GmbH
project: Hearthline
related_entity: Juniper
lines:
  - item: Zigbee door sensors
    quantity: 2
    unit_eur: 18
    line_eur: 36
  - item: AAA rechargeable set
    quantity: 1
    unit_eur: 14
    line_eur: 14
---
# Door and hallway sensor bundle

```text
+----------------+-------------------------------+
| field          | value                         |
+----------------+-------------------------------+
| record_type    | bill                          |
| bill_id        | bill.hearthline_sensor_bundle |
| alias          | hearthline_sensor_bundle      |
| purchased_on   | 2026-01-30                    |
| total_eur      | 50                            |
| counterparty   | Bärenfunk Elektronik GmbH     |
| project        | Hearthline                    |
| related_entity | Juniper                       |
+----------------+-------------------------------+
```

## Line Items

```text
+---+----------------------+-----+----------+----------+
| # | item                 | qty | unit_eur | line_eur |
+---+----------------------+-----+----------+----------+
| 1 | Zigbee door sensors  | 2   | 18       | 36       |
| 2 | AAA rechargeable set | 1   | 14       | 14       |
+---+----------------------+-----+----------+----------+
|   | TOTAL                |     |          | 50       |
+---+----------------------+-----+----------+----------+
```

## Notes

Needed to test whether household events could be summarized without making the house feel creepy.

next_step.current_state: First Juniper bill migrated successfully. Continue migrating remaining Juniper-related bills with exact body preservation.
plan_remaining_steps_brief: Delete inbox request and report completion
next_step.observation: The first target bill file accepted a frontmatter write without error.

function.message:
Completed. I processed the next inbox request and OCR-structured all Juniper-related bills in `50_finance/purchases/` by adding YAML frontmatter while preserving each original note body. Updated files:
- `50_finance/purchases/2026_01_30__eur_000050__bill__hearthline_sensor_bundle.md`
- `50_finance/purchases/2026_02_13__eur_000105__bill__house_mesh_juniper_ssd.md`
- `50_finance/purchases/2026_04_09__eur_000029__bill__repair_ledger_filter_order.md`
Then removed the processed inbox item `00_inbox/000_next-task.md`.
function.rulebook_notes: Followed identity bootstrap (tree, AGENTS, context), inspected 99_system and relevant workflows/schema before task work, preserved full original file bodies beneath frontmatter during migration, and deleted inbox item after successful completion per inbox-processing-v2-update.
function.outcome_justification: The inbox request explicitly asked to OCR all bills related to Juniper. Search and file reads identified three purchase bills with `related_entity` set to Juniper. Each contained all required bill schema fields and line items, enabling compliant frontmatter extraction without guessing. All three were updated successfully, and the inbox item was deleted after completion.
